projectDescription: A highly customizable, mobile-first Hugo theme for personal portfolios and blogs, featuring sections for hero, about, experience, education, projects, achievements, contact, gallery, and built-in i18n support.
keyFeatures: Mobile-first, fully responsive single-page portfolio layout
Configurable sections: Hero, About, Experience, Education, Projects, Achievements, Contact
Internationalization (i18n) with English, Spanish, and French built in
Integrated blog with reading time, scroll progress bar, tags, and social share
Image gallery with viewer.js lightbox support
Google Analytics and Disqus comment support
publicApiSurface: params.hero (enable, intro, title, subtitle, content, image, button, socialLinks, bottomImage, roundImage)
params.contact (enable, title, content, btnName, btnLink, email, formspree)
params.navbar (align, brandLogo, brandName, disableSearch, stickyNavBar, enableSeparator, menus)
params.color (textColor, secondaryTextColor, primaryColor, backgroundColor, secondaryBackgroundColor, darkmode.*)

i18n keys: nav_about, nav_experience, nav_education, nav_projects, nav_achievements, nav_contact, search_placeholder, about, experience, education, projects, achievements, contact, recent_posts, read, toc, tags, social, copyright, email_text, page_not_found, min_read
menu.main entries (identifier, name, title, url, weight, parent)
